sentence: The puppy chased its own tail across the living room floor.
Our kitten curled up and purred softly on the warm blanket.
My old dog wagged his tail and licked my hand happily.
Astronomers photographed a faint distant galaxy through the giant telescope.
The robotic spacecraft slowly entered orbit around the ringed gas planet.
A brilliant supernova briefly outshone every other star in the sky.
She simmered the tomato sauce with garlic and plenty of fresh basil.
He kneaded the bread dough until it turned smooth and elastic.
We roasted the sliced potatoes with olive oil and a pinch of salt.
